Cpr.Py

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/prompt_toolkit/key_binding/bindings/cpr.py

Runs the exact Python code shown below. Output is saved in this browser.


    

    
    
    

      
from __future__ import annotations

from prompt_toolkit.key_binding.key_processor import KeyPressEvent
from prompt_toolkit.keys import Keys

from ..key_bindings import KeyBindings

__all__ = [
    "load_cpr_bindings",
]

E = KeyPressEvent


def load_cpr_bindings() -> KeyBindings:
    key_bindings = KeyBindings()

    @key_bindings.add(Keys.CPRResponse, save_before=lambda e: False)
    def _(event: E) -> None:
        """
        Handle incoming Cursor-Position-Request response.
        """
        # The incoming data looks like u'\x1b[35;1R'
        # Parse row/col information.
        row, col = map(int, event.data[2:-1].split(";"))

        # Report absolute cursor position to the renderer.
        event.app.renderer.report_absolute_cursor_row(row)

    return key_bindings
